summary: Completed comprehensive testing of lead submission forms and blog functionality. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend forms, blog navigation, and integration all functioning correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API health check and root endpoint
POST /api/leads with homepage, city, and industry source data
Homepage audit form submission and success state
Blog index page loads with 6 article cards
Blog post navigation and content rendering
Blog post CTA navigation to homepage audit section
City page form submission (Minnetonka) with source_city field
Industry page form submission (Financial Services) with source_industry field
Footer Resources link navigation to blog index
Article schema JSON-LD present in blog posts
Error handling for invalid API requests and non-existent blog posts
